query: Set up agent policy for this Node/TypeScript repo. It already has AGENT_BLUEPRINT.md, a .nvmrc, and a package-lock.json, but no AGENTS.md yet.
expected_behavior: Chooses the Scaffold mode because AGENTS.md is absent
Detects Node from .nvmrc and uses npm ci as the lockfile-respecting setup command
Generates AGENTS.md that references AGENT_BLUEPRINT.md and stores a commit-trailer TEMPLATE with bracketed placeholders, not concrete provider/model values
Asks the user only for gaps it cannot detect (e.g. Never Run entries, data sensitivity) rather than inventing them
Runs scripts/check.sh and reports all checks passing
